## Validation

## Public-Safety Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes, or the failure is documented above.
- [ ] Relevant synthetic preflight checks pass, or the reason they do not apply is documented above.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, account IDs, deployment state, recovery material, or personal graph data are included.
- [ ] Public Cloudflare, Terraform, and Wrangler examples use placeholders rather than deployment-specific values.
- [ ] New examples, fixtures, logs, screenshots, and docs use neutral synthetic content.
